name: agent-handles-error
description: Two-turn fixture where the agent encounters and handles an error

turns.content: Let me try to read that file.

toolUses.name: Read
toolUses.error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/nonexistent/path.txt'

turns.content: That file doesn't exist. Can you create it instead?
The file doesn't exist. I'll create it for you.
